rows.label: qev018501_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Ah... it's you... What...? You're
saying I have a gloomy face?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0003
rows.name:
Well... It was great that I somehow
managed to present to the corporate
executives thanks to Kirsty's word, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0004
rows.name:
I haven't heard a single thing from
them since then... In the end, my
research has ground to a halt.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_JNK0010
rows.name: Encourage

rows.label: qev018501_SEL0011
rows.name: Encourage him, saying a path will open if he does his best.

rows.label: qev018501_JNK0020
rows.name: Admonish

rows.label: qev018501_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell him the reality that he should just give up already.

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0005
rows.name:
You're right... The Data Probes I developed
will surely cause a revolution...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0006
rows.name:
Thank you, I've gained some courage.
I've received something even greater
than Miranium from you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0007
rows.name: That's... not true![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0008
rows.name:
The Data Probes I developed will
surely cause a revolution and
bring great things to everyone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0009
rows.name:
Next, let's revive the
Attribute Resist Up Probe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0010
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—That being said, this is the last of the series
I made on the White Whale. If this doesn't work,
it can't be helped. I'll cleanly give up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Say, won't you help me with
this challenge? I want you to
get 40000gm of Miranium.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0012
rows.name:
That's right, someone like you
who always uses my Battle Data
Probes understands, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0013
rows.name:
By using this, BLADEs can advance the
battle situation greatly in their favor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0014
rows.name:
Depending on the situation, it
can be a more powerful weapon
than any Doll or firearm.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0015
rows.name: Come on, go get the Miranium.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0016
rows.name:
I'll revive an excellent Data Probe
that those corporate executives will
absolutely not be able to ignore![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0017
rows.name:
The chance Kirsty went out of her
way to give me... I won't waste it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0018
rows.name:
Once I make the Attribute Resist Up
Probe, I'll storm into the corporate
executives' place once again![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0019
rows.name:
I will prove that this invention
will absolutely become the trump
card for NLA's defense.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0020
rows.name: Come on, hurry up and get the Miranium![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0021
rows.name:
I am fully prepared over here! How
is it, did you get the Miranium?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_JNK0030
rows.name: Hand over

rows.label: qev018501_SEL0031
rows.name: Hand over 40000gm of Miranium.

rows.label: qev018501_JNK0040
rows.name: Do not hand over

rows.label: qev018501_SEL0041
rows.name: Do not hand it over for now.

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0022
rows.name:
Good... I'll immediately make
my prized Battle Data Probe...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0023
rows.name:
The Attribute Resist Up Probe! This
one is on a completely different
level from the ones up until now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0024
rows.name: Look forward to it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0025
rows.name:
Ah... Ahh! W-Wait, listen
to this for a second![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0026
rows.name:
Right at the exact moment it was
completed, an email came in...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0027
rows.name:
Believe it or not... it was a request
from a corporation wanting to entrust
an entire research project to me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0028
rows.name:
Apparently, it's a massive project,
and that seems to be the reason it
took so much time until now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0029
rows.name:
The power of the Battle Data Probes
was acknowledged! Say, this current
situation... it's not a dream, is it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_JNK0050
rows.name: Bless

rows.label: qev018501_SEL0051
rows.name: Congratulate Hugo.

rows.label: qev018501_JNK0060
rows.name: Criticize

rows.label: qev018501_SEL0061
rows.name: Express doubt over whether it's okay to become a corporate dog.

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0030
rows.name:
This is all thanks to your
support up until now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0031
rows.name:
Thank you, I won't forget
this debt of gratitude.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0032
rows.name: Are you worried about me? But it's fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0033
rows.name:
Apparently, they're going to let me
advance the research entirely my own way![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0034
rows.name:
From now on, I probably won't be
able to hand over Battle Data
Probes directly like this, so...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0035
rows.name:
This is the final Battle Data Probe
I send to you! Please accept it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0036
rows.name:
The masterpiece Battle Data Probe!
The Attribute Resist Up Probe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0037
rows.name:
If you install this at a Frontier Net
Spot, all attribute resistances will
increase, reducing the damage taken.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0038
rows.name:
Utilize it well and protect the
people of this city. I too will
surely, through my next research...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0039
rows.name:
Protect this NLA[ST:wide ]—humanity's
final bastion![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0045
rows.name: [ST:wide ]—Hm? What are you putting on airs for?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018501_MSG0046
rows.name:
Hurry up and let me start
producing the Battle Data Probe.[ST:wait ]
